designSystem.name: Vânia Mello — Nutricionista Clínica LP
designSystem.description: Design system for a warm, professional, nature-inspired landing page for a clinical nutritionist. The aesthetic is organic-elegant: soft sage greens, warm earth tones, rounded shapes, and a mix of serif display + clean sans-serif body typography. The overall feel is calming, trustworthy, and premium — like walking into a well-designed wellness clinic.
designPrinciples: ORGANIC WARMTH: Every element should feel natural and inviting — rounded corners, soft shadows, muted botanical palette. No sharp edges, no cold blues, no corporate rigidity.
BREATHABLE LAYOUT: Generous vertical padding between sections (80–120px). Content never feels cramped. White space is a feature, not a gap.
ALTERNATING RHYTHM: Sections alternate between white (#FFFFFF) and soft sage-green (#F4F7F0 / #EDF2E6) backgrounds, creating a gentle visual rhythm that keeps the eye moving down the page.

SERIF FOR SOUL, SANS FOR CLARITY: Display headings use a refined serif font (Playfair Display or Lora) to convey warmth and expertise. Body text and UI elements use a clean sans-serif (DM Sans, Nunito, or Poppins) for readability.
ITALIC EMPHASIS: Key words in headings are styled in italic serif to create a handwritten, personal feel — as if the nutritionist is speaking directly to you.
GREEN = TRUST + HEALTH: The dark sage green (#3D5A3E / #4A6741) is the anchor color — used for buttons, headings, accents, and section backgrounds. It communicates health, nature, and calm authority.
SUBTLE DECORATIVE ELEMENTS: Large, faint cursive letters or botanical line art in the background of hero and CTA sections add visual richness without competing with content.
PROGRESSIVE DISCLOSURE: The page flows from promise → proof of expertise → process → social proof → personal story → location → FAQ → final CTA. Each section answers the next logical question.

primary.description: Main brand color. Used for primary buttons, section headings, accent lines, and the dark-background sections (testimonials, final CTA). Deep sage green that feels natural, not clinical.

secondary.description: Alternating section background color. Very soft sage/mint — barely tinted. Creates warmth without being distracting.

tertiary.description: Used for card backgrounds, FAQ accordion items, and hover states. Slightly more saturated than lightSage.

accent.description: Mid-tone green for icons, decorative elements, step indicators, and secondary UI elements.

decorative.description: For subtle background decorative strokes, watermark-style cursive letters in the hero, and the scrolling marquee bar.

text.heading: #2C3E2D
text.description: Headings are near-black green-tinted. Body text is dark olive. Muted text for captions and secondary info.

headingFont.style: Use italic for emphasis keywords within headings. Example: 'Como será o nosso processo?' — the word 'processo' is italic serif.

navbar.description: Minimal — just the logo in the top-left of the hero. No sticky nav. No hamburger. The page is a single-scroll LP, so navigation is implicit via scroll.
navbar.logo: Logo mark (icon) + 'Vânia Mello' in serif + 'Nutricionista' in small sans-serif below

heroSection.layout: Two-column: text left (55%), image right (45%). On mobile: stacks vertically, text first.
heroSection.background: Light sage (#F4F7F0) with a large, faint decorative cursive letter (like a giant 'V' or 'N') in the background, semi-transparent (#C5D4B3 at 15–20% opacity), positioned in the upper-right area behind the photo.
heroSection.tagAboveTitle: Pill-shaped tag with the credential text. Background: transparent or very subtle border. Text: small sans-serif, dark green.
heroSection.title: Large serif heading, 42–52px. Key emotional words in italic. Line-height tight (1.15). Dark green color.
heroSection.subtitle: Below the title, 16–18px sans-serif, regular weight, muted text color. Max-width ~500px to keep line length readable.
heroSection.ctaButton: Dark green pill button with white text + a small white circle with an arrow icon (→) on the right side of the button. Padding generous.
heroSection.belowButton: Small muted text: 'Atendimento em Vinhedo e Online'.
heroSection.image: Photo of Vânia — warm, approachable, professional. Rounded corners (20px). Can have a small floating 'social proof' badge overlaid in the bottom-right (like a Doctoralia verified badge or star rating mini-card).
heroSection.socialProofBadge: Small card overlaid on the bottom-right of the hero image, showing: profile photo thumbnail + name + verified icon + rating stars. White background, subtle shadow, rounded corners.

marqueeBar.description: Horizontal infinite-scroll ticker strip below the hero section. Contains repeating benefit phrases separated by decorative dots or leaf icons.
marqueeBar.animation: Smooth continuous left-scroll, infinite loop. CSS animation: translateX. Duration ~20–30s for a natural pace.
items: Resultados que respeitam o seu ritmo
Planos alimentares que cabem na sua rotina
Mais energia e bem-estar no dia a dia
Alimentação leve sem culpa e sem restrições
marqueeBar.separator: • or small leaf icon between each item

processSection.layout: Centered title + subtitle, then 3 cards in a horizontal row below. Cards connected by a subtle line or arrow indicators between them.

cards.style: White background, subtle sage border or very light shadow. Each card has: icon at top (line-art style, sage green) → card title (bold sans-serif) → short description (regular sans-serif, muted). Between cards 1→2 and 2→3, place a small green circle with a '>' arrow to show progression.
cards.iconStyle: Thin line-art icons in sage green (#7A9E7E). Simple, elegant — not filled. Examples: clipboard icon for consultation, fork+knife or document for plan, refresh/loop for follow-up.

specialtiesSection.layout: Two columns of cards (3 per column = 6 total). Each card is a simple row: icon on the left + title and description on the right.

cards.style: Clean, minimal. White or transparent background. Small green icon (circle with line-art icon inside) on the left, title in bold sans-serif, description in regular muted text below.

aboutSection.layout: Two-column: large photo of Vânia on the left (with rounded corners, ~45% width), text content on the right (~55%).
aboutSection.image: Warm, approachable photo. Rounded corners (20–24px). Can have subtle shadow.
aboutSection.title: 'Quem é Vânia Mello?' — serif heading with the name in italic.
aboutSection.content: Bullet points with small green dot markers. Text in sans-serif body. Keep concise — 3–4 key points about expertise and approach.
aboutSection.ctaButton: Dark green pill button below the text: 'Agende uma consulta'.
aboutSection.quote: Optional: a highlighted quote box below or integrated — light green background, serif italic text, attribution below.

testimonialsSection.layout: Full-width dark green background (#3D5A3E). Centered heading in white. 3 testimonial cards in a horizontal row below.
testimonialsSection.subtitle: White text, lighter opacity

structure: Testimonial quote text in dark body color, 14–15px, regular weight, wrapped in quotation marks
Patient first name + age + city — caption style, muted green

testimonialsSection.ctaButton: Below the cards, centered: white outline or white-filled button on the dark green background.

locationSection.layout: Title and description on the left. Map embed and/or clinic photos on the right.
locationSection.title: Serif heading with italic emphasis on key words
locationSection.map: Google Maps embed or static image with rounded corners (16–20px)
locationSection.clinicPhotos: Optional carousel/row of clinic interior photos with rounded corners

faqSection.layout: Two-column: title + intro text on the left, accordion items on the right.
faqSection.title: Serif heading, left-aligned. Subtitle text below.

accordionItems.style: Light sage background (#EDF2E6 or #F4F7F0), rounded corners (12–16px), padding 20–24px. Each item has: question text on the left (sans-serif, semi-bold) + a '+' icon on the right that rotates to '×' when expanded.
accordionItems.expandedStyle: Same background, content text appears below the question with 12px padding-top. Smooth expand animation (max-height transition).

finalCTASection.layout: Full-width dark green background (#3D5A3E). Can include a background image (blurred food/nature photo at low opacity). Text centered or left-aligned.
finalCTASection.title: Large serif heading in white. Key word in italic.
finalCTASection.subtitle: White body text, max-width ~600px
finalCTASection.ctaButton: White background with dark green text — OR — outlined white button. Pill shape. Arrow icon circle.
finalCTASection.supportInfo: Below button: location, hours, and contact info in small white/muted text

footer.layout: Centered: logo + CRN number + social icon (Instagram). Minimal.

primary.iconCircle: A 32–36px white circle on the right side of the button containing a dark green arrow (→ or ↗). This is a signature UI element — always include it.

onDarkBg.iconCircle: Dark green circle with white arrow

icons.style: Line-art, thin stroke (1.5–2px), NOT filled. Sage green (#7A9E7E) color. Simple and elegant — medical/health themed but not clinical. Think: minimalist, hand-drawn feel.
icons.size: 40–56px for section icons, 20–24px for inline icons
icons.containerCircle: Optional: place icons inside a circle with #EDF2E6 background and no border, size 64–80px

animations.scrollReveal: Elements fade-in + slide up slightly (translateY: 20px → 0) as they enter the viewport. Duration: 0.6s. Ease: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94). Stagger children by 0.1s delay.
animations.marquee: Infinite horizontal scroll. CSS: @keyframes marquee { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }. Duration: 25s linear.
animations.buttonHover: Scale to 1.02, shadow increases, icon circle slides right slightly (translateX: 4px). Duration: 0.3s ease.
animations.faqExpand: max-height transition from 0 to auto (use a large max-height value like 500px). Duration: 0.4s ease. '+' icon rotates 45° to become '×'.

rules: Hero: stack vertically on mobile (text → image). Image becomes 100% width.
Process cards: stack vertically on mobile. Remove arrow connectors, use vertical line or numbers instead.
Specialty cards: single column on mobile.
Testimonials: horizontal scroll (snap) on mobile or stack vertically.
About section: stack vertically on mobile (image on top, text below).
FAQ: full-width, single column on all screens.
Section padding reduces to 48–64px on mobile.

imageGuidelines.heroPhoto: Professional but warm. Vânia smiling, ideally holding food (fruit, etc.) or in her clinic. Clean background. Shot from waist up. Rounded corners: 20px.
imageGuidelines.aboutPhoto: More personal — Vânia in a casual-professional setting. Can be slightly warmer/lifestyle tone. Rounded corners: 20–24px.
imageGuidelines.clinicPhotos: Clean, well-lit interior shots. Rounded corners: 16px. Show the welcoming environment.
imageGuidelines.photoOverlap: On desktop, the hero image can slightly overlap or extend beyond its column boundary for visual interest.
